source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Trident Efficiency
upgrades.description: Acclimation to local water density allows Mermonkey to attack faster with all attacks.

upgrades.name: Trident Swiftness
upgrades.description: Tridents are thrown faster and travel further.

upgrades.name: Abyss Dweller
upgrades.description: The Abyssal Creature awakens, angrily lashing out at Bloons with powerful tentacles and granting nearby Monkeys a small pierce increase.

upgrades.name: Abyssal Warrior
upgrades.description: Coats tridents in a thick ink that slows Bloons. Abyssal Creature grows in power, destroying most Bloons with ease and enhancing nearby Monkeys with more pierce.

upgrades.name: Lord of the Abyss
upgrades.description: The fully unleashed wrath of the Abyssal Creature brings the power of the depths to the surface, annihilating most Bloons, and greatly enhancing the pierce of nearby Monkeys.

upgrades.name: Sharper Prongs
upgrades.description: Can pop more Bloons with each attack.

upgrades.name: Tidal Chill
upgrades.description: Icy tridents are larger and can freeze Bloons.

upgrades.name: Riptide Champion
upgrades.description: Mermonkey draws energy from the sea. Tridents can pop Lead Bloons, grow in power as they travel, and crash with devastating force.

upgrades.name: Arctic Knight
upgrades.description: Tridents grow in power faster. Ice Jet ability: Launches a barrage of bouncing ice balls following target priority, or targeted point.

upgrades.name: Popseidon
upgrades.description: Popseidon's Ice Jet ability draws such power that a rogue wave floods the map with supercooled water, freezing all Bloons and reclaiming the weak for the sea.

upgrades.name: Echosense Precision
upgrades.description: Mermonkey can detect Camo Bloons and tridents seek their target.

upgrades.name: Echosense Network
upgrades.description: Increases range for all Echosense Mermonkeys. Stacks up to 10 times.

upgrades.name: Alluring Melody
upgrades.description: Entrances non MOAB-Class Bloons with a hypnotic tune, magically detonating all damage over time effects, disrupting Bloon movement, and strips Camo.

upgrades.name: Symphonic Resonance
upgrades.description: Hypnotic tune can affect low tier MOAB-Class Bloons. Can be set to echo from a nearby point.

upgrades.name: The Final Harmonic
upgrades.description: This Elder can echo its irresistible tune anywhere. While devastating to Bloons, the call inspires nearby Heroes with improved range and cooldowns, and Magic Monkeys extra pierce.
